title: OATP Toolset Registry
description: Schema for toolsets.json — the Open Agent Toolset Protocol registry declaring allowed tools, phases, capabilities, and instrumentation configuration.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI for this document.

description.description: Short description of the toolset's purpose.

manifesto_ref.description: URI pointing to the manifesto or governing spec for this toolset.

phases.description: Phase names this toolset participates in.

capabilities.description: Declared conformance capabilities for this toolset.

discovery.description: Adapter supports tool discovery queries and well-known path serving.

phase_gating.description: Adapter enforces phase_gate per tool, tracks phase transitions, and enforces required-tool satisfaction.

capability_negotiation.description: Adapter and agent exchange and validate capabilities blocks at session start.

state_attestation.description: Adapter enforces structured instrumented_return contracts on surgery and instrumentation tools.

gps_protocol.description: Adapter enforces the GPS sub-sequence (locate -> map -> instrument) within the reconnaissance phase.

policies.description: Global policy rules applied to all invocations.

default_action.description: Action for invocations that match no explicit allow/deny entry. Default: 'deny'.

allow.description: Tool names or glob patterns explicitly permitted. Evaluated before deny. Globs match tool name, not command line.

deny.description: Tool names or glob patterns explicitly forbidden. Always wins on conflict with allow.

forbidden_args.description: Literal argv sequences that are denied before execution.

name.description: Unique name for this tool entry.

phase.description: When in the GPS sequence this tool runs. Use 'any' for tools that may run in any phase.

category.description: What kind of tool this is. Open vocabulary — canonical values include: navigation, syntax-match-rewrite, semantic-query, transform-at-scale, merge-diff, index-search, semantic-search, cross-reference, config-substrate, logic-substrate, verification, synthesis-smt, datalog-logic, structural-edit.

verification_mode.description: How the tool's output can be verified.

priority.description: Numeric category-substitution preference. Higher values win when several tools satisfy the same category.

description.description: Human-readable description of this tool's purpose.

binary_repo.description: Upstream source URL for the tool binary.

operational_constraints.description: Normative constraints on usage (e.g. 'read-only', 'no network', 'single-file scope').

required.description: If true, this tool MUST be invoked at least once per phase before phase exit is permitted.

requires_prior.description: List of tool names or category references (prefix 'category:') that MUST have been invoked in the current phase trace before this tool may run. ANY entry satisfies the precondition (logical OR).

gps_step.description: Optional GPS sub-step within reconnaissance phase. Only enforced when capabilities.gps_protocol is true.

requires_approval.description: If true, invocation is paused pending external approval.

required.description: If true, the adapter MUST reject results that do not match schema_ref.

schema_ref.description: URI pointing to the JSON Schema the tool's return value MUST satisfy.

nested_toolset.description: A nested toolset definition. Same structure as the root toolset. Identified by presence of toolset_name.
